creator: casantos@cpmet.ufpel.tche.br
text:
The current port of LyX, the documento processor is a little
	bit outdated. The attached file contains an updated version
	that inludes the second official fix distributed by the LyX
	team.

Fix: Just replace the current tree by the one contained in the
	attached file.
How-To-Repeat: 
	:-) nothing here
